description_long: This object is a decorative blue vase with a bulbous body and a narrow neck, filled with an abundant arrangement of yellow flowers and green leaves. The vase itself has a smooth, slightly faceted surface and a wide, stable base. The flowers are stylized, with rounded petals and long, slender stems that fan out in various directions, creating a lively and full bouquet. The green leaves are broad and flat, interspersed among the flowers, adding contrast and volume to the arrangement. The overall appearance is vibrant and eye-catching, making it suitable as a centerpiece or ornamental accent. The design suggests a modern, playful interpretation of a classic floral vase.
description: A blue vase with a wide base and narrow neck, filled with yellow flowers and green leaves in a lively, full arrangement. The vase and bouquet create a vibrant, decorative centerpiece.
description_view_0: The vase is seen from the side, showing the blue body and a dense cluster of yellow flowers and green leaves extending outward, with some leaves and flowers overlapping the vase's edge.
description_view_1: A frontal view reveals the full, symmetrical spread of the bouquet, with the blue vase base mostly visible and the flowers and leaves radiating outward in all directions.
description_view_2: This angle highlights the vase's curved profile and the bouquet's asymmetry, with more leaves and flowers visible on the right side.
description_view_3: The bouquet appears especially full and rounded, with the green leaves fanning out widely and the blue vase base clearly visible at the bottom center.
